title: handler.py: accesses internal _entries dict directly, O(n) iteration
description:
src/lichen/interface/handler.py:165 accesses self.node.gradient_table._entries.values() directly. This is:
1. Breaks encapsulation (accessing private _entries)
2. O(n) iteration over all entries

The GradientTable class should expose an __iter__ method for clean access. Lower priority since the table is bounded to MAX_ENTRIES=64.
close_reason: Already fixed - handler.py line 163 uses public entries() method, not _entries
